Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 4 51 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}Where is it!? I'll rip it a new one![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 51 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}We've detected a Shadow outside of Tartarus.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 51 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}We don't know for sure, but we think it's another big one like we saw last month.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 51 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}We must defeat any we find out there as quickly as possible.[n]{f 1 1}

{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 51 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}People may not be aware of the Dark Hour's existence... but if the city is destroyed during that time, inconsistencies will be left behind.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 51 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}In other words, we need to kick some ass, right? Well, count me in![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 51 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}Akihiko, you stay here and wait for the chairman.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 51 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}You still need time to recover. Like this, you'd only get in the way.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 51 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 13 0 0}They'll fare better than you, in your current state.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 51 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 14 0 0}Have faith in them, Akihiko. They've already seen battle firsthand.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_018_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 51 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 23 0 0}Yes you can. You've done just fine so far, haven't you?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_019_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 51 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 24 0 0}Who cares? They chose you, didn't they?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_020_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 51 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 26 0 0}At this rate, you'll be stuck playin' leader forever...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_021_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 51 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 28 0 0}You should let the three of them go first. You need to get ready, right?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_022_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 51 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 29 0 0}Yes. Let's rendezvous in front of the station.[n]{f 1 1}
